meta.title: Lockheed and GE join forces on a new HYPERSONIC jet engine
meta.description:
GE Aerospace and Lockheed Martin just announced the successful testing of a new kind of air-breathing jet engine capable of powering missiles to speeds well in excess of Mach 5 in a smaller, cheaper, lighter, and more efficient package than the most advanced scramjets in testing today. 

Let's run it down.
